seo_description: Current time in Wichita, Kansas. Central Time Zone — CST (UTC-6) in winter, CDT (UTC-5) during DST. Live clock and time differences for Wichita, KS.

faq.question: What time is it in Wichita right now?
faq.answer: Wichita, Kansas, USA uses Central Standard Time (CST, UTC-6) in winter and Central Daylight Time (CDT, UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago. Wichita is on the same time as Chicago, Dallas, and Kansas City — 1 hour behind New York and 1 hour ahead of Denver. The live clock above shows the current Wichita time.

faq.question: What time zone is Wichita in?
faq.answer: Wichita, Kansas is in the Central Time Zone (CT). It uses Central Standard Time (CST, UTC-6) in winter and Central Daylight Time (CDT, UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago. Wichita shares its time zone with Kansas City, Chicago, and Oklahoma City.

faq.question: Does Wichita observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Wichita, Kansas observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the second Sunday in March at 2:00 AM (CST → CDT) and fall back on the first Sunday in November. Kansas follows the standard US DST schedule.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Wichita and New York?
faq.answer: Wichita (CST/CDT, Central Time) is always 1 hour behind New York (EST/EDT, Eastern Time). Both cities observe DST on the same schedule, keeping the gap constant year-round. When it is 9:00 AM in New York, it is 8:00 AM in Wichita.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Wichita?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Wichita are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM CT, Monday through Friday. Wichita is Kansas's largest city and the self-proclaimed 'Air Capital of the World' — home to major aviation manufacturers including Boeing, Spirit AeroSystems, Cessna (Textron Aviation), Beechcraft, and Learjet. Wichita produces more general aviation aircraft than any other city in the world. Koch Industries, one of the largest private companies in the US, is also headquartered in Wichita.
